name: Q-10 velocity-report --format json emits a JSON object with rows[] of {key baseline_avg_ms recent_avg_ms uplift_pct} per §26
command: printf '{"ts":"2026-05-10T00:00:00Z","subagent_id":"review","prompt_id":"p","prompt_version":"1.0.0","model":"sonnet","tokens_in":100,"tokens_out":50,"latency_ms":3000,"exit_code":0,"finding_count":0}\n{"ts":"2026-05-23T00:00:00Z","subagent_id":"review","prompt_id":"p","prompt_version":"1.0.0","model":"sonnet","tokens_in":100,"tokens_out":50,"latency_ms":1000,"exit_code":0,"finding_count":0}\n' > log.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/velocity-report.sh" --log log.jsonl --now 2026-05-25T00:00:00Z --format json > out.json && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));process.exit(Array.isArray(j.rows)&&j.rows[0].key==="p"&&typeof j.rows[0].uplift_pct==="number"?0:1)' && echo json 1>&2
